text:
A Class C driver’s license authorizes the holder of the license to operate:

(1) a vehicle or combination of vehicles not described by Section 521.081 (Class a License) or 521.082 (Class B License) ; and

(2) a vehicle with a gross vehicle weight rating of less than 26,001 pounds towing a farm trailer with a gross vehicle weight rating that is not more than 20,000 pounds.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.083 — Class C License

A Class C driver’s license authorizes the holder of the license to operate:

    (1) a vehicle or combination of vehicles not described by Section 521.081 (Class a License) or 521.082 (Class B License) ; and

    (2) a vehicle with a gross vehicle weight rating of less than 26,001 pounds towing a farm trailer with a gross vehicle weight rating that is not more than 20,000 pounds.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

a vehicle with a gross vehicle weight rating of less than 26,001 pounds towing a farm trailer with a gross vehicle weight rating that is not more than 20,000 pounds.
